sections.changelog:
0.3.9

  • Fix: featured_media now returns post's own positive ID so SearchIQ recognises an image exists
  • Fix: rest_pre_dispatch intercepts /wp/v2/media/{id} for stub posts and returns synthetic media response with source_url — SearchIQ resolves thumbnails without a real WP attachment
  • Fix: wp_get_attachment_image_src filter now matches by post type instead of negative ID sign
  • Add: siq-styles.php — min-height on .siq-blogrfct-facet, object-fit cover on result images, hides empty image placeholder boxes

0.3.8

  • Add: pg_artist taxonomy (flat) — artist/stylist name, SearchIQ Author-facet equivalent
  • Add: pg_content_type taxonomy (hierarchical) — portrait/workspace/before-after/product-shot/team-culture/promotional/client-spotlight
  • Add: sync-image endpoint accepts optional artist and content_type fields

0.3.7

  • Add: configure-site now accepts searchiq_api_key — writes _siq_authentication_code + seed _siq_raw_settings (domain, facets, post types) so SearchIQ activates without manual key entry
  • Add: pg_setup_gallery_page now inserts [searchiq] above [pg_gallery] when SearchIQ is configured; re-running configure-site syncs the page content

0.3.6

  • Fix: updater uses plugin_basename (no hardcoded path), drops null failure caching, adds admin_init force-check, stores last error in site options, adds Test Metadata Fetch button in Settings

0.3.5

  • Add: [pg_gallery] live search + tag-chip facets — client-side filtering with debounced text search, AND chip logic, count display, Clear filters, mobile 2-col breakpoint

0.3.4

  • Fix: updater now caches metadata (1 hr), clears on Check Again, and removes stale no_update entries

0.3.3

  • Fix: add all super admins to new subsites so they appear in every admin's My Sites list

0.3.2

  • Fix: create-site now sets public=1 so subsites appear in Network Admin by default

0.3.1

  • Add: [pg_gallery] shortcode — responsive image grid from pg_gallery_image CPT
  • Add: configure-site now auto-creates Gallery page + nav menu on each new subsite

0.3.0

  • Add: postglider/v1/create-site endpoint — provisions a new multisite subsite on first user upload (idempotent)

0.2.9

  • Fix: remove misplaced auth-session endpoint; update repo URLs to pg-media-vault

0.2.8

  • Add: supawp/v1/auth/session endpoint — validates Supabase JWT, sets WP auth cookie, redirects to return_to

0.2.7

  • Fix: expose image URL in REST API for SearchIQ — jetpack_featured_media_url, thumbnail_url, og:image, embedded wp:featuredmedia

0.2.6

  • Fix: remove metadata transient so Check Again works immediately

0.2.4

  • Fix: flush rewrite rules; fake featured image for PHP thumbnail calls

0.2.2

  • Add pg_gallery_image CPT + sync-image endpoint
